project.name: agent-docs
project.summary: A canonical source-to-multi-target emitter: documentation tools are authored once in Claude-native form and built into five platform bundles (Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Gemini) by one deterministic pipeline.

audiences.name: Skill/tool author
audiences.description: A contributor authoring or editing a skill under skills/ and running the build.

audiences.name: Pipeline maintainer
audiences.description: A developer working on the emitter itself — transforms, discovery, publish, drift guards.

sources.note: build and build --check subcommands; bin agent-docs-build.
name, bin, scripts (build, gate, schema:gen), deps (zod, zod-to-json-schema).
Core in-memory pipeline: discover -> per-target transform -> aggregate; returns EmitResult with no disk writes.
Loads/validates tools.manifest.json; cross-checks tool names against on-disk frontmatter.
Walks manifest tools into SkillRecord/AgentRecord/CommandRecord + shared refs/scripts; sorts by POSIX path (REQ-EMIT-06).
TRANSFORMS registry: one TargetTransform per target.
Zod source of truth: Manifest, Target enum, TARGET_ORDER, tool types.
Atomic, path-confined disk publish of adapters/ + .claude-plugin/ (REQ-SEC-01).
Diffs a fresh emit against the committed tree; build --check throws on drift.
Canonical tool registry + emitter config (dirs, target list).
JSON Schema generated from the Zod Manifest by schema:gen.
Byte-identical golden snapshot per target for the docs-helper sample.
Core emission pipeline over a fixture repo. Integration ground truth.
Existing contributor guide: where tools live, how to add one, build process.

documents.title: Add a skill and build it to every target
documents.purpose: Author a minimal skill, register it in the manifest, and see it emitted to all five targets.

outline.heading: Create skills/<name>/SKILL.md
outline.intent: Author the canonical Claude-native source with frontmatter.

outline.heading: Register it in tools.manifest.json
outline.intent: Add the tool entry the emitter discovers.

outline.heading: Run bun run build
outline.intent: See adapters/<target>/ populated for all five targets.

documents.verification: Add-tool -> emit flow verified against src/test/emit.test.ts over its fixture repo.

documents.title: Edit a canonical source without breaking the build
documents.purpose: Make edits that survive emission and the gate: canonical-only edits, golden regeneration, YAML frontmatter rules.

outline.heading: Edit only skills/<name>/
outline.intent: Never hand-edit adapters/ — they are generated.

outline.heading: Regenerate goldens when needed
outline.intent: Run the golden regenerate step and review the diff.

documents.verification: Canonical-source-only rule and drift behavior verified against src/driftguard.ts and src/test/golden.test.ts.

documents.title: Build CLI reference
documents.purpose: Look up the build and build --check commands, their exit behavior, and the gate scripts.

outline.heading: build
outline.intent: Emit adapters, report, and .claude-plugin/ to disk.

outline.heading: build --check
outline.intent: Drift guard — exit 1 on any drift.

outline.heading: gate scripts
outline.intent: compile, schema:check, typecheck, lint, format, test, build:check.

documents.verification: Command surface verified in src/cli.ts; scripts verified in package.json.

documents.title: tools.manifest.json reference
documents.purpose: Look up every field of the canonical tool registry and emitter config.
documents.verification: Field set verified against the Zod Manifest in src/model.ts and the generated schemas/tools.manifest.schema.json.

documents.title: System context
documents.purpose: Show agent-docs as one system turning canonical sources into five platform bundles consumed by five agent tools.

outline.heading: Context diagram
outline.intent: Canonical sources -> agent-docs emitter -> five target bundles.

documents.verification: Targets verified against TARGET_ORDER in src/model.ts and the transforms in src/targets/.

diagrams.description: System context: the tools.manifest + skills/ sources feed the agent-docs emitter, which produces adapters/{claude,codex,copilot,cursor,gemini}. Draw only the five targets that exist in TARGET_ORDER.

documents.title: The emitter pipeline
documents.purpose: Show the internal stages that turn a manifest into a published adapter tree.

outline.heading: Stages
outline.intent: manifest load -> discover -> per-target transform -> override overlay -> atomic publish.

documents.verification: Stage set verified against src/emit.ts (discover -> transform -> aggregate) and src/publish.ts.

diagrams.description: Component flow: manifest.ts -> discover.ts -> targets/*.ts transforms -> overrides.ts -> publish.ts, with driftguard.ts checking a fresh emit against the committed tree. Only modules that exist under src/.

documents.title: ADR — hand-authored static schemas for in-target contracts
documents.purpose: Record why some schemas (docs.manifest, DocPlan) are hand-authored static assets shipped in skills, while build-input schemas are Zod-generated.

outline.heading: Context
outline.intent: Two kinds of schema: build inputs vs. contracts consumed in target repos.

outline.heading: Decision
outline.intent: Generate build-input schemas from Zod; ship in-target contracts as static assets.

documents.verification: Zod-generated path verified in src/model.ts + schema:gen; the static-asset path is the documented doc-site/docplan precedent.

documents.title: Why the build is deterministic
documents.purpose: Explain the sorting, target ordering, and path-confinement that make output byte-stable and safe.

outline.heading: Deterministic discovery
outline.intent: Arrays sorted by POSIX path / name; fixed TARGET_ORDER.

outline.heading: Path confinement
outline.intent: Publish refuses to write outside the repo root (REQ-SEC-01).

documents.verification: Sorting/order verified in src/discover.ts and TARGET_ORDER in src/model.ts; confinement in src/publish.ts.

gaps.note: The diagram-render.mjs CLI contract (args, stdin/stdout, exit codes) is described in README but not covered by a dedicated CLI schema test — only exercised indirectly. Do not assert a formal CLI contract for it as verified.
agents/ and commands/ directories exist but are empty (.gitkeep only). The pipeline supports them; document them as supported-but-unused, not as active surfaces.
Manifest name/frontmatter cross-check is marked as a to-be-refined item (TQ-4) in src/manifest.ts; state it as intended behavior, not a guaranteed invariant, until confirmed.
Override system records replacements but its behavior on override removal / file deletion is undocumented; do not assert deletion semantics.
